text:
Dolle Harbor (, Dōre-kō) is a port town and common gathering place for aspiring Hunters. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 3 

Overview

Dolle Harbor is a large port area where many aspiring Hunters gathered to travel to Zaban City so they could partake in the Hunter Exam. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

Gon, Kurapika, and Leorio were all dropped off in Dolle Harbor to find their way to the 287th Hunter Exam in Zaban City. An enormous Lone Pine Tree stands atop a hill outside the town. 

Greed Island arc

Killua requests to be transported to Dolle Harbor by Elena after he leaves Greed Island to take the 288th Hunter Exam. After his transportation, he registers for the Exam. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 146 

Later on, exiting the game after deciding what three cards they'll take, Gon, Killua, and Biscuit end up in Dolle Harbor again. Biscuit obtains the "Blue Planet" card and then sees Gon and Killua off as they use their "Accompany" spell card to meet Ngig. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 185
